metadata.title: Beginning Python — From Blocks to Code with Monty
metadata.description: A fun, project-driven course that guides young programmers (ages 10-13) from block-based coding to writing real Python, covering core syntax, data types, control flow, functions, collections, turtle graphics, algorithms, and an introduction to machine learning.
metadata.creator: Dan McCreary
